  · intro hn
    rcases hn with rfl
    exfalso
    have : (0 : Nat) ∈ image f A := by
      simpa using hn
    rcases this with ⟨x, hxA, hx0⟩
    exact (h x hxA).elim

    subst this
    refine ⟨Classical.choice (empty_iff.1 h), ?_, rfl⟩
    exfalso
    exact empty_iff.1 h _ (Classical.choose_spec (empty_iff.1 h))
